description_long: This object is a pair of wireless earbuds housed in a compact, matte black charging case. The case features a rounded rectangular shape with a hinged lid that opens to reveal two contoured earbuds, each with a soft silicone ear tip and metallic mesh speaker grille. The front of the case displays three small indicator lights, likely for battery or charging status. The earbuds are ergonomically shaped to fit comfortably in the ear and are positioned upright within the molded interior of the case. The case exterior is smooth and seamless, with a subtle button or touch area beneath the indicator lights. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for portable use in urban environments.
description: A sleek pair of wireless earbuds in a matte black charging case with indicator lights and ergonomic ear tips. The design is compact, modern, and portable.
description_view_0: Front view showing both earbuds seated in the open charging case, with indicator lights visible on the case.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open lid and the profile of one earbud, revealing the contoured shape and ear tip.
description_view_2: Rear view of the closed case, showing the smooth, rounded back with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the lid open, displaying the other earbud and the interior contours of the case.
